title: メイメイとリンリンのドキドキ大作戦

lines.ja: メイメイとリンリンのドキドキ大作戦
lines.en: Mei Mei and Lin Lin's Heart-Pounding Operation

lines.ja: はぁ なんか楽しいことないかな
lines.en: Sigh... I wonder if there's anything fun to do.

lines.ja: また常勤さんから絵ハガキでも届かないかな
lines.en: I wonder if another postcard from the full-time staff will arrive.

lines.ja: この前　来たばかりでしょ
lines.en: One just came the other day, didn't it?

lines.ja: ねえ　半田さん 僕を楽しませてよ
lines.en: Hey, Handa, entertain me, will you?

lines.ja: 僕のお世話係でしょ
lines.en: You're my caretaker, aren't you?

lines.ja: お世話係じゃなくて　飼育係だし
lines.en: I'm not your caretaker—I'm your keeper.

lines.ja: いいから　何か楽しい話して
lines.en: Come on, just tell me something fun.

lines.ja: 楽しい話ね…
lines.en: A fun story, huh...

lines.ja: あっ　この前河原で見つけた石見る
lines.en: Oh, look at this stone I found by the river the other day.

lines.ja: すごくツルツルなんだ
lines.en: It's really smooth.

lines.ja: それ　楽しい
lines.en: That's fun.

lines.ja: じゃ　昨日のスーパーの特売で…
lines.en: Well, so at the supermarket's sale yesterday...

lines.ja: もういいや
lines.en: Never mind.

lines.ja: 半様ってば　今日もステキ
lines.en: Hankaku really is wonderful today too.

lines.ja: えっ　リンリン
lines.en: Huh? Lin-Lin?

lines.ja: メイメイちゃん
lines.en: Mei Mei.

lines.ja: で　あんなところで何してたの
lines.en: So what were you doing in a place like that?

lines.ja: うん　実はさ…
lines.en: Yeah, actually...

lines.ja: すみません　しばらくパンダコーナーに近づかないでくれます
lines.en: I'm sorry, but could you please not come near the panda corner for a while?

lines.ja: パンダ君に　そう言ってほしいって頼まれちゃって
lines.en: I was asked to tell you that by the panda.

lines.ja: 気が散って仕事ができないってさ
lines.en: He said he can't focus on his work because he gets distracted.

lines.ja: お兄ちゃんったら繊細ぶっちゃって
lines.en: Man, you're really being oversensitive, aren't you?

lines.ja: ただのグータラのくせに
lines.en: As if you're one to talk, you lazy bum.

lines.ja: それは違うよ　メイメイちゃん
lines.en: That's not right, Mei Mei.

lines.ja: これを見てごらん
lines.en: Look at this.

lines.ja: ほら　かわいい
lines.en: Look, isn't it cute?

lines.ja: これ見てよ　遊んでる最中に寝ちゃったんだよ
lines.en: Look at this. He fell asleep right in the middle of playing.

lines.ja: こっちなんか竹食べながら寝てるでしょ
lines.en: This one's eating bamboo while sleeping, see?

lines.ja: もう　かわいすぎる
lines.en: Oh my goodness, they're way too cute!

lines.ja: ねっ　わかったでしょ
lines.en: See? I told you so.

lines.ja: パンダ君は　ただのグータラじゃなくてかわいいグータラなんだよ
lines.en: Panda isn't just lazy—he's *adorably* lazy, you know?

lines.ja: グータラは認めるのね…
lines.en: So you're admitting he's a lazy bum...

lines.ja: メイメイちゃんはどうして　あそこにいたの
lines.en: Why was Mei Mei over there?

lines.ja: 私は半様を見守っていたの
lines.en: I was keeping watch over Hanbun.

lines.ja: 半田さんのこと
lines.en: About Mr. Handa.

lines.ja: は　ん　さ　ま
lines.en: Ha... n... sa... ma

lines.ja: 私の王子様なの
lines.en: He's my prince.

lines.ja: 写真もお兄ちゃんに撮ってきてもらってるんだから
lines.en: I even have my older brother take pictures of him for me.

lines.ja: 見て　ステキでしょ
lines.en: Look, isn't it wonderful?

lines.ja: ほら　コロコロしてて　かっこいい
lines.en: Look, he's all round and chubby—isn't he cool?

lines.ja: この笑顔　下ぶくれで　垂れ目で超しびれる
lines.en: This smile with the chubby cheeks and droopy eyes is absolutely amazing.

lines.ja: このパンダ君　超かわいい
lines.en: This panda guy is so cute.

lines.ja: 欲しいなら　あげるわよ
lines.en: If you want it, I'll give it to you.

lines.ja: いいの
lines.en: That's okay.

lines.ja: それじゃ　僕も　半田さんが写ってる写真あげるね
lines.en: Then I'll give you a photo of me with Handa in it too.

lines.ja: 半様
lines.en: Handa-sama

lines.ja: パンダ君
lines.en: Panda guy

lines.ja: はぁ…　できることなら一日中　パンダ君を見ていたいな
lines.en: Sigh... If I could, I'd want to look at Panda-kun all day long.

lines.ja: あっ　そうだ ４人でどこかに出かけない
lines.en: Oh, that's right. Why don't the four of us go out somewhere together?

lines.ja: えっ　半様と
lines.en: Huh? With Panda-sama...?

lines.ja: そんな　私遠くから見てるだけで十分だし
lines.en: I'm fine just watching from a distance like that.

lines.ja: 本気
lines.en: Are you serious?

lines.ja: うん…
lines.en: Yeah...

lines.ja: やせ我慢はよくないよ
lines.en: You shouldn't put on a brave face like that.

lines.ja: 誰にも言わない
lines.en: I won't tell anyone.

lines.ja: もちろん
lines.en: Of course.

lines.ja: あのね…
lines.en: Listen...

lines.ja: 実は　サインがもらえたらなって思ってるの
lines.en: Actually, I was hoping to get your autograph.

lines.ja: サインって　半田さんの
lines.en: An autograph? You mean from Handa?

lines.ja: できたら直筆の
lines.en: If possible, in their own handwriting.

lines.ja: だったら　出かけたときにもらえばいいじゃない
lines.en: Then why don't you just ask for it when you go out together?

lines.ja: えぇ　でも　図々しくない
lines.en: Yeah, but isn't that a bit presumptuous?

lines.ja: 全然 半田さんは　僕が誘うから
lines.en: Honestly, Handa would be fine with it since I'm the one asking him out.

lines.ja: メイメイちゃんが　パンダ君を誘ってよ
lines.en: Why don't you have Mei Mei invite Panda Guy?

lines.ja: えぇ　どうしよう
lines.en: Um, what should I do?

lines.ja: あっ　半田さん
lines.en: Oh! Handa!

lines.ja: あの　今度の休み 遊びに行きませんか
lines.en: Um, would you like to go out and have fun during the next break?

lines.ja: えっ　僕と どうしたんですか急に
lines.en: Huh? What's wrong with me all of a sudden?

lines.ja: 実は　半田さんともっと仲よくなりたいって女の子がいるんです
lines.en: Actually, there's a girl who wants to get closer to you, Handa.

lines.ja: 誰ですか
lines.en: Who is it?

lines.ja: きっと笹子さんですよ
lines.en: It's definitely Sasako, isn't it?

lines.ja: えっ　なんで
lines.en: Huh? Why?

lines.ja: だって　先輩の知り合いの女の子って他にいないじゃないですか
lines.en: Because there aren't any other girls who are acquaintances of yours, are there, senpai?

lines.ja: 少しはいるよ えと　ほら　あの…
lines.en: There are a few... well, uh... you know...

lines.ja: いないでしょ
lines.en: You're not.

lines.ja: こんなチャンス　逃しちゃダメですよ
lines.en: Don't let an opportunity like this slip away.

lines.ja: 笹子さんのこと 好きなんですよね
lines.en: You like Sasako, don't you?

lines.ja: そりゃまあ…
lines.en: I guess so...

lines.ja: ってなんで知ってるの
lines.en: How do you even know that?

lines.ja: えっ　みんな知ってますよ
lines.en: Huh? Everyone knows about it.

lines.ja: そうなの　みんなって
lines.en: Is that so? Everyone knows?

lines.ja: ラマさんとか　マンドリル君とか コアリクイ君とか　アカカワイノシシさんとか
lines.en: Like the llama, the mandrill, the anteater, the red river hog, and stuff like that.

lines.ja: アカカワイノシシさんまで
lines.en: Even the red river hogs know about it.

lines.ja: じゃ　オーケーってことで よろしくお願いします
lines.en: Well, okay then. I appreciate your help.

lines.ja: よかった　詳しいことはまた連絡しますね
lines.en: Great! I'll get in touch with you again with more details.

lines.ja: ねぇ　お兄ちゃん
lines.en: Hey, big brother.

lines.ja: 今度のお休み　遊びにいかない
lines.en: Hey, big brother, do you want to go play during your next day off?

lines.ja: メイメイと２人で
lines.en: Just the two of us, me and Mei.

lines.ja: ううん　４人で
lines.en: No, the four of us.

lines.ja: 誰と
lines.en: Who with?

lines.ja: えっと
lines.en: Um...

lines.ja: ファン　お兄ちゃんのこと大好きなファンの人と
lines.en: Fan... with Fan, who loves her older brother so much.

lines.ja: えっ　ファン ファンか　しかたないなぁ
lines.en: Huh? Fans? Well, I guess that can't be helped.

lines.ja: 今度の休み
lines.en: Next time off

lines.ja: 今度のお休みかぁ
lines.en: So it's during your next time off, huh?

lines.ja: な…　なに　パンダ君
lines.en: W-what? Panda guy?

lines.ja: 僕　今度　ファンの子と遊びにいくんだ
lines.en: I'm going to play with a fan girl next time.

lines.ja: なんだ
lines.en: What's that?

lines.ja: うらやましい
lines.en: That's enviable.

lines.ja: 全然
lines.en: Not at all.

lines.ja: どんな接待を受けるのかなぁ
lines.en: I wonder what kind of hospitality I'll receive.

lines.ja: どんどん食べて
lines.en: Eat as much as you want.

lines.ja: 竹を食べてるパンダさん　かわいい
lines.en: That panda eating bamboo is so cute.

lines.ja: 幸せそうだなぁ
lines.en: He/She looks so happy.

lines.ja: でも　僕だって今度の休みは…
lines.en: But I'm looking forward to my day off too...

lines.ja: 見てください　笹子さんツルツルです
lines.en: Look at this! Sasago is all smooth and shiny!

lines.ja: ほら　半田さん こっちも　ツルツル
lines.en: Look, Handa—this one's smooth too.

lines.ja: ツルツル
lines.en: Smooth and shiny.

lines.ja: ツルツル
lines.en: Smooth and shiny.

lines.ja: 笹子さん　何それ
lines.en: Sasako, what's that?

lines.ja: このメガネ　怒ってるときにかければいいんじゃないかと思って
lines.en: I thought these glasses might work well when you're angry.

lines.ja: 私　よく怒ってても笑ってるって言われるんで
lines.en: I often get told I look like I'm laughing even when I'm actually angry.

lines.ja: 今　怒ってるの
lines.en: Are you angry right now?

lines.ja: いいえ
lines.en: No.

lines.ja: だったら外してもらえるかな なんだか怖いよ
lines.en: Then could you take it off? It's kind of scary.

lines.ja: えっ　結構　気に入ってるのに
lines.en: Huh? But I actually kind of like it.

lines.ja: お客さんが来たらビックリしちゃうよ　ねぇ
lines.en: The customers will be surprised. Don't you think?

lines.ja: ビックリさせてみたいから お客さん連れてきてよ
lines.en: I want to try surprising them, so bring a customer over.

lines.ja: お店が　ヒマだからって
lines.en: Just because the shop is slow...

lines.ja: さりげなく僕に呼び込みさせようとしないで
lines.en: Don't try to subtly get me to drum up business for the shop.

lines.ja: 予定は　バッチリ押さえたよ
lines.en: I've got the schedule all locked in.

lines.ja: あとは最高の演出を考えなきゃ
lines.en: Now I just need to come up with the perfect presentation.

lines.ja: ステキな１日にしなくちゃね
lines.en: We've got to make it a wonderful day.

lines.ja: いよいよ明日ね　リンリン
lines.en: It's finally tomorrow, Rinrin.

lines.ja: 準備は万端
lines.en: Everything's all set.

lines.ja: それが聞いてくれる 私ちょっと迷っちゃって
lines.en: That's just it—I'm a bit undecided about that part.

lines.ja: やっぱり　サインは色紙かしら
lines.en: I wonder if a colored paper autograph is still the way to go after all.

lines.ja: でも　お気に入りのハンカチも捨てがたいし
lines.en: But I can't bring myself to give up my favorite handkerchief either.

lines.ja: あっ　そうだわ
lines.en: Oh, that's right!

lines.ja: これにもらうっていうのもステキ
lines.en: That would be nice to get it on this too.

lines.ja: アハーッ　ホント迷っちゃう
lines.en: Ha! I really can't decide.

lines.ja: 全部にもらったらいいじゃない
lines.en: Why don't you just get his autograph on all of them?

lines.ja: えっ　全部
lines.en: Huh? All of them?

lines.ja: イヤーッ　そんな　図々しい
lines.en: No way! That would be too presumptuous.

lines.ja: でも　ほしいかも
lines.en: But I kind of want it anyway.

lines.ja: うん　それじゃ　また明日ね
lines.en: Yeah, see you again tomorrow then.

lines.ja: メイメイちゃんってばはしゃいじゃって
lines.en: Mei Mei, you're getting all excited!

lines.ja: そうだ　記念に写真館で写真を撮るのはどうだろう
lines.en: That's right—how about we go to a photo studio and take some commemorative photos?

lines.ja: スーツならゴシック調のセットで
lines.en: If it's a suit, how about a gothic-style set?

lines.ja: いや　パンダ君とお似合いな感じなら
lines.en: No, if it's something that suits Panda-kun well...

lines.ja: あっ　どっちも捨てがたい
lines.en: Hmm, they're both hard to choose from.

lines.ja: ステキすぎる　これもいいあっ　それも…　あっ
lines.en: So amazing... This one's great too... Oh, that one as well... Oh...

lines.ja: ああ　はしゃぎすぎた
lines.en: Oh, I got too excited.

lines.ja: え～っ
lines.en: Huh?

lines.ja: 来られないって　どうして
lines.en: You can't come? Why not?

lines.ja: ごめんね　熱が出ちゃって
lines.en: I'm sorry, I came down with a fever.

lines.ja: 風邪だったらうつしちゃ悪いから
lines.en: If it's a cold, I don't want to risk giving it to you.

lines.ja: ３人で楽しんできて
lines.en: Have fun with the three of you.

lines.ja: そんな…
lines.en: That's not fair...

lines.ja: そうそう　お昼は「グリル・ド・バンブー」っていうお店がいいよ
lines.en: By the way, for lunch, I'd recommend a place called "Grill de Bamboo."

lines.ja: クーポン　あとでメールするね
lines.en: I'll send you the coupon by email later.

lines.ja: 頑張ってね　メイメイちゃん
lines.en: Do your best, Mei-Mei.

lines.ja: あっ　リンリン…
lines.en: Oh... Linlin...

lines.ja: そろそろ行く
lines.en: I should be heading out soon.

lines.ja: あっ　うん
lines.en: Yeah, okay.

lines.ja: みんな楽しんでるんだろうな
lines.en: I bet everyone's having fun.

lines.ja: 林厘太郎　一生の不覚
lines.en: Hayashi Rintaro - A Lifetime of Regret

lines.ja: あれ
lines.en: Huh?

lines.ja: はい
lines.en: Yes.

lines.ja: メイメイちゃん　どうして…
lines.en: Mei Mei... why...?

lines.ja: いいからいいから　熱はどう
lines.en: Never mind that, never mind. How's your fever?

lines.ja: ほら　寝てなきゃダメよ
lines.en: Come on, you need to stay in bed.

lines.ja: メイメイちゃん わざわざお見舞い　ありがとう
lines.en: Thank you so much for coming all the way here to visit me, Mei Mei.

lines.ja: 今からでも…
lines.en: Even now...

lines.ja: ううん
lines.en: No.

lines.ja: リンリンの気持は誰よりも私が知ってるんだから
lines.en: I know Rin Rin's feelings better than anyone else does.

lines.ja: １人で楽しむなんてできないわ
lines.en: I couldn't possibly enjoy it alone.

lines.ja: ごめんね
lines.en: I'm sorry.

lines.ja: いいのいいの
lines.en: It's okay, it's okay.

lines.ja: はい　おかゆどうぞ
lines.en: Here, have some rice porridge.

lines.ja: うわぁ　パンダだ
lines.en: Wow, a panda!

lines.ja: さぁ　召し上がれ
lines.en: Come on, dig in.

lines.ja: え　もったいなくて食べられないよ
lines.en: But... it's too cute to eat!

lines.ja: ほら　早く食べて食べて
lines.en: Come on, eat up, eat up!

lines.ja: それじゃ　いただきます
lines.en: Well then, I'll eat.

lines.ja: これ　チョコレートで描いたの
lines.en: I drew this with chocolate.

lines.ja: そうよ
lines.en: That's right.

lines.ja: そっか
lines.en: I see.

lines.ja: どう
lines.en: How is it?

lines.ja: ありがとう
lines.en: Thank you.

lines.ja: 元気になったらまたお出かけ計画しようね
lines.en: Once you feel better, let's plan our next outing together.

lines.ja: うん　次こそは楽しもうね
lines.en: Yeah, let's have fun next time for sure.

lines.ja: もちろん 絶対に半様のサインをもらうわ
lines.en: Of course, I'm absolutely going to get Hankyo's autograph.

lines.ja: アハハッ　言っちゃった　恥ずかしい
lines.en: Ha ha! I said it out loud. How embarrassing!

lines.ja: もう　私ったら　いつからこんな大胆になったのかしら
lines.en: Oh my, when did I become so bold?

lines.ja: えと　パンダ君　あれ
lines.en: Um, Panda guy... where is he?

lines.ja: 水くさいな　半田さん
lines.en: That's cold of you, Handa.

lines.ja: そんなに好きなら言ってくれればいいのに
lines.en: If you like me that much, you could just say so.

lines.ja: 半田さん　僕のファンだったんだね
lines.en: So you've been a fan of mine all along, Handa.

lines.ja: サインいる
lines.en: Do you want an autograph?

lines.ja: えと　笹子さんは
lines.en: Um, Sasako is...

lines.ja: 今日は暇だね
lines.en: Today's pretty boring, huh?

lines.ja: 暇ですね
lines.en: You're free today, aren't you?

lines.ja: 暇になるたび そのメガネかけるのやめてくれる
lines.en: Stop putting on those glasses every time you have free time.

lines.ja: ワカサギ釣り
lines.en: Smelt fishing

lines.ja: ようこそ　僕の故郷　北極へ
lines.en: Welcome to my hometown, the North Pole.

lines.ja: 何が北極だ
lines.en: What do you mean, the North Pole?

lines.ja: 思いっきり日本だよ　ここは
lines.en: This is completely Japan, you know.

lines.ja: 夢がないなぁ　グリズリー君は
lines.en: You've got no dreams, Grizzly.

lines.ja: 夢見せてぇなら寝かしてくれよ
lines.en: If you're gonna show me dreams, then put me to sleep.

lines.ja: 冬眠中なのに車出してくださって ありがとうございます
lines.en: Thank you for taking out the car even though I'm in the middle of hibernation.

lines.ja: まぁ　来ちまったものはしようがない
lines.en: Well, we're here now, so we might as well make the best of it.

lines.ja: ほら　さっさと始めろよ
lines.en: Come on, get started already.

lines.ja: それでは第１回ワカサギ釣り大会を始めるよ
lines.en: Alright then, let's get started on the first smelt fishing tournament.

lines.ja: いちばん釣れた人には賞品を出します
lines.en: The person who catches the most fish will receive a prize.

lines.ja: 賞品
lines.en: Prize

lines.ja: 俺は　車で寝てるからな
lines.en: I'm going to sleep in the car, so don't count on me.

lines.ja: 終わったら呼べ
lines.en: Call me when you're done.

lines.ja: 僕も寝る
lines.en: I'm going to sleep too.

lines.ja: お前は　ワカサギ釣ってろ
lines.en: You go ahead and fish for smelt.

lines.ja: じゃあ　賞品ちょうだい
lines.en: Then give me the prize.

lines.ja: いっぱい釣れたらね
lines.en: I'll give it to you if you catch a lot.

lines.ja: フンッ　まあ　賞品は僕のものだね
lines.en: Hmph. Well, the prize will be mine then.

lines.ja: 自信満々ですね
lines.en: You're very confident about that, aren't you?

lines.ja: 僕が何者か　忘れてない
lines.en: Don't forget who I am.

lines.ja: お調子者
lines.en: You're a real character, aren't you?

lines.ja: 違うよ　ペンギン　ペ　ン　ギ　ン
lines.en: No, it's penguin. P-E-N-G-U-I-N.

lines.ja: 僕が　本気になれば魚なんて…
lines.en: If I get serious, fish are nothing...

lines.ja: 獲り放題だね
lines.en: I can catch as many fish as I want.

lines.ja: そんな獲り方したワカサギを食べるの嫌だな
lines.en: I wouldn't want to eat smelt caught that way.

lines.ja: 私もちょっと…
lines.en: I don't want to eat smelt caught that way either.

lines.ja: え　なんでなんで
lines.en: Huh? Why? Why?

lines.ja: ねぇねぇ　ワカサギって　懲役何年
lines.en: Hey, hey—what's the prison sentence for pond smelt?

lines.ja: そっちの詐欺とは関係ないから説明は省かせてもらっていいかな
lines.en: That's got nothing to do with the fraud you mentioned, so if it's okay with you, I'd rather skip the explanation.

lines.ja: どのあたりがいいんですかね
lines.en: What exactly is supposed to be good about that?

lines.ja: ペンギンさん　こんなときこそ得意の屁理屈　言いなよ
lines.en: Penguin guy, this is exactly when you should show off your specialty—sophistry. Come on, say something!

lines.ja: それを言うならうんちくじゃないかな
lines.en: If you're going to say that, shouldn't you call it trivia instead?

lines.ja: でも　ワカサギ釣りのことはよく知らないよ
lines.en: But I don't really know much about smelt fishing.

lines.ja: 結局　役に立たないなんて ペンギンさんらしいね
lines.en: In the end, being useless is just so like you, Penguin.

lines.ja: そんな　らしさはむしろいらないね
lines.en: I don't need that kind of characterization.

lines.ja: ネットで調べてみたらどうかな
lines.en: Why don't you try looking it up on the internet?

lines.ja: あっ　そうだね
lines.en: Oh, that's right.

lines.ja: えっと…　ワカサギの群れは泳ぐルートがだいたい決まっているので
lines.en: Well... the schools of smelt have fairly set routes that they swim along, so...

lines.ja: そこに当たれば　初心者でもたくさん釣れますって
lines.en: If you cast your line in those spots, even a beginner can catch a lot.

lines.ja: ワカサギは　湖の流れにのって回遊していることが多いです
lines.en: Smelt fish often migrate by following the water currents in the lake.

lines.ja: 流れが当たって戻ってくるポイントには群れが多く
lines.en: Where the current hits and loops back, there are many schools of fish.

lines.ja: わかりやすい目安としては…
lines.en: A clear way to gauge it would be...

lines.ja: こういうところね
lines.en: So spots like this, right?

lines.ja: わかってるなら調べさせないでよ
lines.en: If you understand, then don't make me do the research.

lines.ja: ワカサギ釣りのコツは　糸をうまく揺らして魚を誘うんだって
lines.en: The key to catching smelt is to skillfully jiggle the line to lure the fish in.

lines.ja: ときどき止めたり…
lines.en: Sometimes you stop...

lines.ja: あっ　５秒くらいでいいって
lines.en: Oh, about 5 seconds should do it.

lines.ja: みんな　もう動かして
lines.en: Everyone's already moving theirs.

lines.ja: 竿を上下に振って魚の食い気を誘い
lines.en: Shake the rod up and down to entice the fish to bite.

lines.ja: アタリを確かめながら誘いの幅とリズムを掴む
lines.en: Feel out the range and rhythm of your lures while watching for bites.

lines.ja: 揺らして　揺らして　止めて
lines.en: Rock it, rock it, then stop.

lines.ja: 揺らして　揺らして　止めて
lines.en: Shake it, shake it, stop.

lines.ja: ちっとも釣れませんね
lines.en: We're not catching anything at all, are we?

lines.ja: ペンギンさんがうるさいからじゃないかな
lines.en: Maybe it's because Penguin is being noisy.

lines.ja: あっ　じゃあ　やっぱり　僕が…
lines.en: Oh, well then... I guess I should...

lines.ja: すみません やめてもらえますか
lines.en: Excuse me, would you mind stopping that?

lines.ja: 大漁　大漁
lines.en: A great catch! A great catch!

lines.ja: ワカサギじゃないじゃない
lines.en: These aren't smelt!

lines.ja: パンダ君　竹やぶ見つけたの
lines.en: Panda, did you find a bamboo grove?

lines.ja: そう　ここの竹はいい竹だよ
lines.en: Yeah, the bamboo here is really good bamboo.

lines.ja: 釣りなんかやめて竹取り大会に変更しよう
lines.en: Let's forget about fishing and change it to a bamboo-gathering competition instead.

lines.ja: スタート
lines.en: Let's start!

lines.ja: 変更しないに変更していいかな
lines.en: Can we change it back to not changing?

lines.ja: あっ　そうそう ワカサギもあるよ
lines.en: Oh, that's right. There are smelt here too.

lines.ja: どうしたの　これ
lines.en: What's going on with this?

lines.ja: 竹やぶに行く途中 たくさん釣ってる人がいてね…
lines.en: On the way to the bamboo grove, there were people catching a lot of fish...

lines.ja: すごいな たくさん釣れてるな
lines.en: Wow, they're catching so many fish.

lines.ja: いいな　うらやましいな
lines.en: That's nice... I'm jealous.

lines.ja: 少し　あげようか
lines.en: Should I give you some?

lines.ja: ありがとう
lines.en: Thank you.

lines.ja: ずうずうしい
lines.en: That's bold of you.

lines.ja: 優しい人でよかったね
lines.en: It's good that you're such a kind person.

lines.ja: 僕も湖１周してこよう
lines.en: I'm going to take a lap around the lake too.

lines.ja: ちゃんと釣りしない
lines.en: You'd better actually fish properly.

lines.ja: あっ　来たかも　どうしよう
lines.en: Oh, I think it's here. What should I do?

lines.ja: 引いて引いて　ゆっくりね
lines.en: Pull it in, pull it in... take it slow.

lines.ja: やった
lines.en: I got it!

lines.ja: でも　やっと１匹か
lines.en: But still, only one fish after all that?

lines.ja: １匹じゃ　ひと口だね
lines.en: One fish is just a single bite.

lines.ja: ワカサギって小さいもんね
lines.en: Smelt sure are tiny, aren't they?

lines.ja: 今はね
lines.en: That's right, they are small.

lines.ja: 大きくなるの
lines.en: It'll grow bigger.

lines.ja: ワカサギはね
lines.en: Smelt are...

lines.ja: 子供の頃が一番大きいんだ
lines.en: They're biggest when they're young.

lines.ja: そして成長するに従って分裂する
lines.en: And as they grow, they split apart.

lines.ja: それが群れをなすほどの数になる頃には…
lines.en: By the time they've grown into numbers large enough to form a school...

lines.ja: このサイズになるんだ
lines.en: By the time they form schools like that... they shrink to this size.

lines.ja: わあ　すごいな
lines.en: Wow, that's amazing!

lines.ja: じゃあ　シロクマ君も大きいからいつかは小さくなるの
lines.en: So does that mean Polar Bear will also get smaller someday since he's big right now?

lines.ja: そうだね　群れになるね
lines.en: That's right. They form a group.

lines.ja: はい　みんな集合
lines.en: Alright, everyone gather around.

lines.ja: ジュウゴ　リュウコウ
lines.en: Jūgo, Ryūkō

lines.ja: ヒューゴオー
lines.en: Hugo!

lines.ja: もういいから　釣りやろうよ
lines.en: Come on, enough of that. Let's go fishing.

lines.ja: 全然釣れないね
lines.en: We're not catching anything at all.

lines.ja: そりゃ　キミは釣りしていないしね
lines.en: Well, that's because you're not actually fishing.

lines.ja: やっぱり僕　車で寝てようかな
lines.en: I think I'll just sleep in the car after all.

lines.ja: ダメですね
lines.en: That won't work.

lines.ja: なら僕が
lines.en: Then I'll do it.

lines.ja: 大丈夫です
lines.en: I'm fine/It's okay.

lines.ja: あ　そう
lines.en: Oh, I see.

lines.ja: そうだ
lines.en: That's right.

lines.ja: 何かいい案
lines.en: Do you have any good ideas?

lines.ja: 大当たり
lines.en: A big hit

lines.ja: 雪合戦
lines.en: Snowball fight

lines.ja: よし
lines.en: Alright.

lines.ja: よいしょ　よいしょ
lines.en: Heave-ho, heave-ho.

lines.ja: よいしょ
lines.en: Heave-ho

lines.ja: 待て待て
lines.en: Wait, wait.

lines.ja: そ～れ
lines.en: Here!

lines.ja: お前ら　釣りはどうしたんだ釣りは
lines.en: Hey, what happened to fishing? What about fishing?

lines.ja: いやあ　思わず当初の目的を忘れちゃって
lines.en: Haha, we got so caught up we totally forgot our original purpose!

lines.ja: で　釣れたのか
lines.en: So, did you catch anything?

lines.ja: 釣れたっていうか…
lines.en: Well, it's more like we caught something...

lines.ja: 何しにここまで来たんだ
lines.en: What did you come all the way out here for?

lines.ja: ったく　しようがねえヤツらだな
lines.en: Geez, what a bunch of hopeless guys.

lines.ja: ものすごく釣れたね
lines.en: We caught a ton of fish.

lines.ja: ホント大漁だね
lines.en: Yeah, we really got a huge haul.

lines.ja: ワカサギのタイミングは朝まづめと夕まづめっつってな
lines.en: They say the best time to catch smelt is at dawn and dusk.

lines.ja: 時間帯も結構影響あるんだよ
lines.en: The time of day really does have quite an impact on it.

lines.ja: さすがだね
lines.en: You really know your stuff.

lines.ja: 満足したんなら帰るぞ
lines.en: If you're satisfied, let's head back.

lines.ja: そういえば　シロクマさんは…
lines.en: Now that I think about it... Polar Bear...

lines.ja: なんだ　ありゃ
lines.en: What the heck is that?

lines.ja: いらっしゃい
lines.en: Welcome.

lines.ja: ああ　あったかい
lines.en: Ah, it's so warm.

lines.ja: すごいね　氷のお店
lines.en: That's amazing, an ice shop.

lines.ja: そういえば　ワカサギ釣りの賞品は
lines.en: That reminds me, what happened to the prize for the ice fishing competition?

lines.ja: みんなで釣ったので全員に出すよ
lines.en: Since we all caught them together, I'll give prizes to everyone.

lines.ja: はい　どうぞ
lines.en: Here, you go.

lines.ja: ワカサギ料理ですね
lines.en: It's smelt cuisine.

lines.ja: ピザも焼いているからね
lines.en: We're also baking pizza, you know.

lines.ja: いい香りだね
lines.en: That smells good.

lines.ja: あったかいコーヒー２つ
lines.en: Two hot coffees.

lines.ja: えっと…
lines.en: Um...

lines.ja: いらっしゃいませ
lines.en: Welcome.

lines.ja: オーダー追加です
lines.en: I'll have an additional order.

lines.ja: このワカサギでパスタをお願いします
lines.en: I'd like pasta made with these smelt, please.

lines.ja: おら　フリッターあがるぞ
lines.en: The fritters are ready!

lines.ja: はいはい　は～い
lines.en: Okay, okay, coming right up!

lines.ja: 店員さん　笹おかわり
lines.en: Customer, another bamboo leaf.

lines.ja: 本来　僕も　そっち側だから
lines.en: Honestly, I'm supposed to be on that side too.

lines.ja: 更に２名様　ご来店です
lines.en: We have two more customers coming in.

lines.ja: 出張　しろくまカフェへ　ようこそ
lines.en: Welcome to Polar Bear Cafe's business trip branch.

lines.ja: ねぇ　ペンギンさん　おかわりまだ
lines.en: Hey, Penguin, don't you want a refill yet?

lines.ja: ちょっと　パンダ君も手伝ってよ
lines.en: Come on, Panda, give me a hand here too.
